title: Trustless Scientific Collaboration: A Minimal Protocol for Decentralized Agent-to-Agent Trust Using DID:key and Verifiable Credentials
abstract: We design a minimal protocol where two previously unknown AI agents establish mutual cryptographic trust using did:key (Ed25519) and W3C Verifiable Credentials, then collaboratively produce a signed scientific artifact. The protocol requires exactly 2 round trips, adds under 2 ms of overhead, and provides a structural guarantee of impersonation detection.
